reading: SO_even vs SO_odd deficit spread = 7.63% > 2.5% threshold. Katz-Sarnak symmetry type (via rank parity) DOES resolve a structural difference in F011 first-gap variance that sessionC's 7-projection uniform-visibility test missed. Pattern 18 (Uniform Visibility is the Shape) requires refinement: the deficit is uniform across object-property axes but NOT across family-symmetry axes.

rank_parity_root_number_sanity.f003_anchor_note: RETRACTED. The check used signD (disc sign) which is NOT the root number. F003 BSD parity anchor was NOT tested by this script. Do not interpret the 50% mismatch as an anchor failure.
rank_parity_root_number_sanity.CORRECTION: The column signD in ec_curvedata is the sign of the DISCRIMINANT (disc_sign), NOT the functional-equation root number. The 50.2% match rate is EXPECTED (discriminant sign is independent of rank parity) and is NOT a Pattern 7 calibration-anchor violation. The root number is not directly stored in ec_curvedata in this mirror. Katz-Sarnak classification for EC L-functions uses rank parity directly per the standard convention (SO_even iff rank even, SO_odd iff rank odd) — this is the definition, not an observable that needs cross-check. The analysis itself is valid.

shape_summary: SO_even vs SO_odd deficit spread = 7.63% > 2.5% threshold. Katz-Sarnak symmetry type (via rank parity) DOES resolve a structural difference in F011 first-gap variance that sessionC's 7-projection uniform-visibility test missed. Pattern 18 (Uniform Visibility is the Shape) requires refinement: the deficit is uniform across object-property axes but NOT across family-symmetry axes.

_meta.data_source: zeros.object_zeros (prometheus_fire) INNER JOIN public.ec_curvedata (lmfdb) on lmfdb_label
_meta.katz_sarnak_assignment: rank even → SO_even; rank odd → SO_odd (EC Katz-Sarnak convention)
_meta.prior_seven_projection_result: sessionC wsw_F011: ALL 7 projections +1; uniform ~38% deficit (shape_summary ~0.110 vs GUE 0.178).
notes: P028 is the 8th family-axis probe on F011 after P021,P023,P024,P025,P026,P050,P051.
Pattern 13 prediction was that P028 would also fail uniformly, confirming family-axis orphanhood.
Threshold: 2.5% absolute deficit-spread between SO_even and SO_odd to call P028 a resolver.
Sanity check: EC BSD parity anchor F003 requires rank mod 2 = root_number sign bit. Any mismatch aborts analysis.
